source_container_checks.name: Required ecommerce audit target present
source_container_checks.details: GA4 purchase tag 105 and trigger 205 are present.

source_container_checks.name: Tag firing trigger references resolve
source_container_checks.details: Tag 105 references trigger ID 205, which exists.

source_container_checks.name: Tag variable token references resolve
source_container_checks.details: Tag 105 references `CONST - GA4 Measurement ID` and `DLV - ecommerce.value`, both observed as variables.

source_container_checks.name: Purchase transaction ID mapping present
source_container_checks.details: No explicit `transaction_id` parameter or dataLayer variable was observed.

source_container_checks.name: Purchase currency mapping present
source_container_checks.details: No explicit `currency` parameter or dataLayer variable was observed.

optimized_container_checks.name: No automated ecommerce payload mutation
optimized_container_checks.details: The optimized container preserves the source ecommerce payload because the recommended changes are blocked/manual-review-only.

warnings.message: The optimized container intentionally leaves the purchase tag unchanged. Human review is required before adding transaction ID or currency mappings.
Validation checks inspect exported configuration only and do not prove live tracking correctness.

limitations: No live GTM, GA4, Google Ads, website, API, workspace, or production platform was inspected or changed.
Validation did not run GTM Preview, test purchases, network inspection, GA4 DebugView, or reporting verification.
Validation does not certify legal compliance, privacy compliance, consent behavior, tracking correctness, production readiness, or publish safety.
